General.Name: Fulum Group
General.Description: Fulum Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates restaurants under the Fulum and Sportful Garden brands in Hong Kong and Mainland China. It operates supermarkets; processes, sells, and distributes food products; owns trademarks; lends money; provides management services; trades in kitchen utensils and other products; and holds properties, as well as operates food court. Fulum Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Capital Tower, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong
